description_long: This object is a cylindrical advertising column, commonly known as a Litfaßsäule, with a faceted black cap and base. The main body is wrapped in a blue poster featuring the title 'Cities: Skylines' and various promotional graphics and text in German, including event details and scenic imagery. The surface appears to be made of smooth, glossy material, likely metal or plastic, designed to withstand outdoor conditions. The column is freestanding and robust, with no visible openings or interactive components aside from the display surface. The graphics are vibrant, dominated by blue, black, and some orange highlights, and the structure is tall and slender, suitable for placement on sidewalks or plazas. There are no visible illumination features or electronic displays, indicating it is a static, printed advertising board.
description: A tall, cylindrical advertising column with a glossy blue poster, black faceted cap and base, and static printed promotional graphics.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main advertising poster with clear 'Cities: Skylines' branding, event details, and scenic imagery.
description_view_1: This side view reveals more of the cylindrical shape, with the poster wrapping around and some text partially visible in lower light.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly in shadow, showing the plain cylindrical form with minimal visible detail or graphics.
description_view_3: This angled view displays a mix of poster graphics and the transition between light and shadow, highlighting the glossy surface.
attribute_frame_design: thick black faceted cap and base with cylindrical body
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a video game event with scenic graphics and German text
